title: NIRVANA music discs
description: Carefully replaces minecraft music from discs to NIRVANA songs
body:
![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680d86a8ad07e49340f68ecb85e2da95cbeab2f4.png)

## What does this resourcepack do?

It replaces music from vanilla minecraft discs to Nirvana songs

## What songs replaces music discs?

Here's a list:

- 5 - I Hate Myself And Want To Die
- 11 - Rape Me
- 13 - Territorial Pissings
- blocks - About A Girl
- cat - Marigold
- chirp - You Know You're Right
- creator music box - On A Plain (acoustic)
- creator - On A Plain
- far - Dumb
- lava chicken - Beans
- mall - Polly
- mellohi - Stay Away
- otherside - Smells Like Teen Spirit
- pigstep - Breed
- precipice - Drain You
- relic - Lithium
- stal - The Man Who Sold The World
- strad - All Apologies
- tears - Heart-Shaped Box
- wait - Come As You Are
- ward - Something In The Way

## What languages does this resourcepack support?

In version 2.0.0 I added support for all of the languages</br>
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52764a19dbb2729b1beaee9a6d9a5132b5e1d610.png)</br>
And also I added distance from jukebox support, _but with a slight technical catch - all the songs is now on mono chanel_</br>
Contact me if you want this change to be reverted

## Does the names of the songs shows on discs?

Yes, the name of the song shows in your inventory:

![In tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c97036c77d43d02b43cb07fe84f34f09dd139d.png)
